name: HowTo-Genie v4.0 — Voice & Audio Content Pipeline

nodes.name: 🎙️ Audio Pipeline Trigger (4PM Daily)
nodes.notes: Runs after translation pipeline completes. Creates audio for all 9 language versions.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Load Config
nodes.notes: Runs core/01_Config_Loader.json. Downstream nodes use $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.

nodes.name: 🌍 Get All Language Versions
nodes.notes: Fetches today's post in all 9 languages (EN + 8 translations).

nodes.name: 🎤 ElevenLabs: Generate Audio
nodes.notes: ElevenLabs premium voices. 29 languages supported. $22/mo for 100K chars.

nodes.name: 🗣️ Google TTS: Generate Audio
nodes.notes: Google Cloud TTS. Free tier: 1M chars/month. Supports 100+ languages.

nodes.name: ☁️ Upload to Google Cloud Storage
nodes.notes: Stores audio files. Alternative: AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, or Backblaze B2.

nodes.name: 📻 Build Podcast RSS Feed
nodes.notes: Generates RSS feed item for podcast directories.

nodes.name: 🎵 Submit to Spotify
nodes.notes: Spotify for Podcasters API. Auto-publishes episode.

nodes.name: 📺 Upload to YouTube
nodes.notes: YouTube Data API. Creates audio-only video with static image.
